runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 525m at this track. Can't make much of a case this time.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Geelong (30.39) in a Special conditions H, finishing a 4.5 lengths second. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Expected to be in the finish.

runners.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and he is facing a tougher line up. Has failed to show enough to come into contention here.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 525m (30.27) beating Arc Flash in Grade 6 on April 8. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 525m (30.27) beating Arc Flash in Grade 6 on April 8. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 350m at Healesville behind Aston Rennes beaten 4.5 lengths (19.70). Placed two back at Geelong. Was in the money five on end before missing the frame last time. Worth another try.

runners.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 450m at Shepparton by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.
